nasb.text: Now it happened at the end of two full years that Pharaoh had a dream, and behold, he was standing by the Nile.

esv.text: After two whole years, Pharaoh dreamed that he was standing by the Nile,

cnv.text: 過了兩年，法老作了一個夢，夢見自己站在河邊。

ccb.text: 两年后，法老做了个梦，梦见自己站在尼罗河边，

csbs.text: 过了两年，法老做了一个梦，梦见自己正站在尼罗河边。
